ocr_findings.description: Publisher's design/typesetting company name: image reads 'クニメディア株式会社' but OCR outputs 'クエメディア株式会社' — single kana substitution ニ→エ, corrupting the proper noun.

Furigana reading hint line 'ぜったいこうかく きょう か しょ で じゅんもんだいしゅう' rendered in OCR as garbled string 'せったいこうやく きょう か しょ ぐ じゃんもんだいしゅう' — multiple kana errors in the ruby/furigana line, though this is a secondary annotation.

reviewer_notes: This is the colophon/奥付 page (copyright, publishing details, author bio, ISBN), not a book cover. The existing label 'cover' is incorrect; 'other' is the appropriate label for a colophon page. Two OCR findings: one med-severity proper noun error (クニメディア→クエメディア) and one low-severity furigana corruption.
